data.title: Dow rises, Nasdaq & S&P 500 fall. Oracle stock plunges on earnings. Equal-Weighted S&P 500 hits high.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index experienced a rise, whereas the Nasdaq and S&P 500 saw a decline. AI stock Oracle plummeted following a drop in earnings. Moreover, the Equal-Weighted S&P 500 reached a new high as ATI and Penumbra broke out. The latest live coverage revealed these movements in the market, highlighting the fluctuating trends among key indices and specific company stocks. This information is critical for investors to stay informed about the current market landscape and make strategic decisions.

data.title: Faye & Spiky.ai integrate to update SugarCRM with AI insights from Zoom, Teams, and more. Dec. 11, 2025 launch.
data.description: In a recent development, Spiky.ai's real-time meeting intelligence will now be seamlessly integrated with SugarCRM, bringing valuable AI-derived insights from popular platforms such as Zoom, Microsoft Teams, and Google Meet. This integration, announced from CALABASAS, Calif. on Dec. 11, 2025, will automatically update both standard and custom fields within SugarCRM. This innovation aims to enhance workflow efficiency and productivity for users, providing them with valuable data from meetings to optimize their customer relationship management.

data.title: Talk With Me Baby expands impact with new leadership, partnerships, and training for early language development nationwide.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, in Atlanta, it was announced that providing rich language exposure is crucial for success in education and overall well-being. This is supported by scientific evidence emphasizing the importance of early healthy brain development in the Talk With Me Baby (TWMB) program. TWMB is a pioneering initiative led by the Rollins Center for Language &...

data.title: Corporate adoption of Bitcoin slowing down in 2025, with 117 new firms adding BTC to balance sheets, but Q4 saw only 9 so far. Total: 147 firms hold under 500 BTC.
data.description: The adoption of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) by corporations is growing in size, but the rate of growth has been slowing down towards the end of 2025. Recent data from CryptoQuant reveals that although more companies have been adding BTC to their balance sheets this year, the monthly rate of adoption has decreased. A total of 117 new firms have adopted Bitcoin in 2025, with the peak activity observed in July. The quarterly breakdown demonstrates the slowdown: Q1 had 16 companies, while Q2 and Q3 had 39 and 53 companies, respectively. However, Q4 has seen a decline with only 9 companies so far. It is worth noting that many of these corporate treasuries hold relatively small amounts of Bitcoin, with 147 companies owning under 500 BTC. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Veteran Ventures Capital invests in Vatn Systems ($60M Series A funding) to support US military autonomous underwater vehicles.
data.description: Veteran Ventures Capital (VVC) from McLean, Virginia, has revealed its involvement in the latest funding round for Vatn Systems (Vatn), a defense technology firm specializing in constructing autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) for the US military, as well as allied nations. The Series A financing totals $60 million.

data.title: Pillar Biosciences and AstraZeneca expand partnership to offer liquid biopsy tumor profiling in China, Dec 8, 2025.
data.description: NATICK, Massachusetts - On December 8, 2025, Pillar Biosciences revealed an extension of its laboratory access initiative with AstraZeneca for NGS-based kitted liquid biopsy tumor profiling. This extended partnership will now encompass China as well. The goal of this enhanced collaboration is to provide fast and affordable solutions for conducting tumor profiling.

data.title: Disaster survivors oppose FEMA Review Council draft report proposing cuts to workforce and disaster support.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, a leaked FEMA Review Council report suggested significant changes, including reducing FEMA's workforce, cutting federal disaster support, and rebranding the agency. This has raised worries nationwide about the United States' disaster preparedness. The report has sparked discussions due to its potential implications, like downsizing the workforce, reducing federal support for disasters, and redefining the agency's image. This development has prompted concern about the country's ability to respond effectively to emergencies, with many questioning the impact of these proposed changes on FEMA's operations.

data.title: NexTalk adds compatibility with Amazon Connect, Genesys, NICE, and SharpenCX, bringing TTY communication to contact centers.
data.description: In Salt Lake City, NexTalk is enhancing its cloud ecosystem by introducing integrations that incorporate TTY communication into current contact center setups. This development aims to improve accessibility and communication for individuals using TTY services. By expanding its ecosystem, NexTalk is working towards ensuring seamless integration of TTY services in contact centers to benefit a wider audience.

data.title: Workato partners with Confluent to merge real-time signal detection and enterprise orchestration, enhancing workflows. #partnership #signal #data
data.description: Palo Alto, California - Workato®, an Enterprise MCP company, has revealed a new collaboration with Confluent, Inc. (Nasdaq: CFLT), a leading data streaming organization. This latest technology partnership merges real-time signal detection with enterprise-wide orchestration. Through this integration, Confluent’s Streaming Agents are linked with Workato Enterprise MCP (Model Context Protocol), allowing businesses to automatically identify patterns within large event streams and efficiently carry out complex, multi-step workflows.

data.title: Perficient recognized as a Major Player in three IDC MarketScape reports for AI-First approach to customer experience.
data.description: Perficient was recognized as a Major Player in three IDC MarketScape reports, as announced in St. Louis today.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer survey finds 56% of PAs use AI daily, with 19% relying on AI extensively, in various healthcare settings.
data.description: In Waltham, Massachusetts, a recent survey by Wolters Kluwer Health revealed that AI has become a regular part of clinical practice for physician assistants (PAs). Among PAs, also known as physician associates, 56% reported using AI daily, with 19% utilizing it extensively. The survey highlighted that the top applications of AI among PAs are clinical documentation (61%) and ambient scribe technologies for note-taking during patient interactions (48%). The report, Future Forecast: The Growing Impact of PAs in the Healthcare Ecosystem, indicates a rising significance of PAs in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Comcast and Amazon partner to launch Amazon Luna cloud gaming on Xfinity devices.
data.description: Comcast and Amazon have teamed up for the launch of Amazon Luna Cloud Gaming on Xfinity's entertainment devices. Users in Philadelphia and Seattle will now be able to access the service, expanding their gaming options. This collaboration showcases Comcast's commitment to providing cutting-edge entertainment to its customers. The addition of Amazon Luna Cloud Gaming will offer Xfinity users a wide range of gaming experiences, further enhancing their entertainment choices. This partnership highlights the growing trend of cloud gaming and its increasing popularity among consumers.

data.title: 102 million caregivers report banks failing, True Link study finds. Customers value caregiver support, 70% may consolidate deposits for it.
data.description: A recent study conducted by True Link in 2025 revealed significant findings for financial institutions, with 102 million Americans over the age of 25 (45%) acting as financial caregivers for a loved one. Among them, 28% assist aging parents or adults with disabilities, while 24% aid children or teenagers (with 7% contributing to both categories). The study indicated that customers value positive experiences, as 70% expressed willingness to consolidate deposits at a bank offering robust caregiver support.

data.title: First Horizon Corp. (NYSE: FHN) named to Forbes America's Best Employers for Women 2025 list after surveying 140,000 women.
data.description: A company based in Memphis, Tennessee, First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN or "First Horizon"), revealed on December 11, 2025, that it secured a spot on the prestigious Forbes America's Best Employers for Women 2025 list. In collaboration with market research firm Statista, Forbes conducted a survey that encompassed over 140,000 women to determine the top employers.

data.title: Royal Air Maroc introduces first nonstop LA-Casablanca flight on June 7, 2026, with three weekly flights connecting Africa and US West Coast.
data.description: On June 7, 2026, a significant flight path linking Africa and the U.S. West Coast is set to commence operations with three flights scheduled each week. This new service, initiated by Royal Air Maroc, will directly connect Los Angeles (LAX) and Casablanca (CMN). The inaugural flight marks an important milestone in air travel as it enhances connectivity between these two key regions.

data.title: Phillips and Sing named PHFA 2026 housing policy fellows in Harrisburg. Funding to benefit policymakers and industry.
data.description: Two individuals, Zachary Phillips and Dr. Evaine K. Sing, have been selected as the recipients of the 2026 Kathy A. Possinger Housing Policy Fellowship by the Pennsylvania Housing Finance Agency. This funded research, announced in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania on December 11, 2025, aims to support policymakers and the affordable housing industry. This fellowship will provide valuable insights and recommendations that could potentially benefit policymakers and industry professionals in ensuring adequate and affordable housing solutions.
